notes: v1.0.18 — Admin panel ergonomics: panel now centered along the bottom with up to 720px width (was anchored bottom-right at 380px), and the URL row's refresh + edit controls are now full IconButtons with proper 48dp touch targets. Verbose OTA error messages: a failed download now shows the actual file size + expected vs got SHA256, so download truncation vs wrong-content delivery is distinguishable at a glance. Carries forward v1.0.15-17: scoped TLS cert bypass for OTA endpoints (cdn.ksrdevsolutions.com, kiosk-wrapper-ota.web.app) — integrity still guaranteed by APK SHA256 verification. v1.0.14: bundled GlobalSign Root CA + GTS R1/R4 + ISRG X1 in both Android trust store and Dart SecurityContext. v1.0.11+: persistent HOME launcher pin, real-time card scan push, hidden scrollbars, native QR via printBytes raster, MY_PACKAGE_REPLACED self-relaunch, Poppins typography, cancellable OTA, HugeIcons, three admin exit actions.
